---
title: "Firmware"
---

# Firmware

This section describes the embedded firmware of the Air Analyzer project.

## Firmware structure

The firmware is located mainly inside:

```text
micro_usb/
```

## Main firmware tasks

- Initialize peripherals
- Acquire sensor data
- Handle USB or serial communication
- Process breathing-related signals
- Manage interrupts or timers

## Main file

The main application logic is located in:

```text
micro_usb/Core/Src/main.c
```

## Build environment

Add here information about:

- STM32CubeIDE or VS Code setup
- Required extensions
- Compiler/toolchain
- Flashing procedure
